assumptions: Corridor and node topology remains authoritative.
Passenger autonomy is excluded from readiness claims.
Artifacts are governance and planning surfaces only.

evidence_refs.note: Project goal and current simulator scope.
Physics variables mapped into governed state variables.

uncertainties: Threshold values are planning anchors and require tranche evidence before promotion.
Node contingency saturation requires broader sweep coverage.

research_records.title: Portfolio Constraint Intake
research_records.summary: Defines corridor-node architecture, cargo and public service priority, and governed evidence expectations.
threshold_hypotheses: queue saturation exits the safe region before governed pilot planning
comms degradation must remain bounded during weather-induced rerouting
open_questions: What tranche evidence density is sufficient for promotion beyond integrated simulation?

research_records.title: Program Control Governance Intake
research_records.summary: Defines artifact taxonomy, manifest requirements, and blocker-linked promotion discipline.
threshold_hypotheses: every deployment stage promotion must reference blocker severity and coverage status
open_questions: How should cross-stage blocker retirement be summarized across repeated runs?

state_variables.name: Corridor Density
state_variables.description: Aggregate corridor density across the governed network.
state_variables.safe_operating_guidance: Keep rho_e below congestion onset identified by threshold tracking.

state_variables.name: Communications Effectiveness
state_variables.description: Effective communication freshness and reliability proxy.
state_variables.safe_operating_guidance: Maintain gamma_e above degraded-mode trigger thresholds.

state_variables.name: Trust Degradation Burden
state_variables.description: Weighted trust degradation burden over active vehicles.
state_variables.safe_operating_guidance: Keep chi_e bounded below trust quarantine escalation thresholds.

state_variables.name: Contingency Queue Ratio
state_variables.description: Queue pressure against contingency handling capacity.
state_variables.safe_operating_guidance: Keep queue_e below sustained contingency saturation limits.

thresholds.rationale: Congestion onset should be captured before cargo corridor saturation destabilizes contingency access.
Communications degradation below this floor makes stale state routing materially more likely.
Trust burden above this ceiling increases quarantine churn and network instability.
Queue saturation is a direct signal that contingency handling is no longer bounded.

scenarios.name: Weather With Cargo Priority Retention
scenarios.description: Heavy weather plus protected cargo corridors while public service nodes absorb spillback.

failure_injections.description: Reduce capacity across the primary cargo corridor band.

metric_specs.name: Corridor Density
metric_specs.description: Density must remain below safe-region breach.

success_criteria.description: Cargo corridor density stays below breach.

scenarios.name: Communications And Trust Compound Failure
scenarios.description: Message staleness and trust degradation arrive together on public service corridors.

failure_injections.description: Force stale updates and packet drops across public service corridors.
Downgrade trust state for a contributing fleet supplier.

metric_specs.name: Communications Effectiveness
metric_specs.description: Comms effectiveness must stay above degraded floor.

metric_specs.name: Trust Degradation Burden
metric_specs.description: Trust burden must stay below breach ceiling.

success_criteria.description: Communications remain above the stale-state floor.

hazards.title: Contingency Spillback
hazards.description: Contingency queues spill back into corridor service and degrade cargo/public service throughput.
mitigations: Reserve contingency slots for public service nodes.
Reduce corridor admission rates when queue thresholds enter warning state.

hazards.title: Stale State Routing
hazards.description: Stale state and trust degradation cause invalid routing and quarantine churn.
mitigations: Hold degraded suppliers at corridor entry until trust recovers.
Route public service missions through hardened comms corridors.

blockers.title: Threshold Evidence Density Gap
blockers.description: Promotion to later stages requires denser tranche evidence around queue and trust boundaries.
blockers.resolution_path: Expand tranche coverage around queue_e and chi_e thresholds.

blockers.title: Node Contingency Review Pending
blockers.description: Public service contingency slot reservation still needs node-by-node review.
blockers.resolution_path: Confirm node contingency reservations against cargo/public service demand.

blockers.title: Governance Board Hold
blockers.description: Governance review has not cleared governed pilot planning while active blockers remain.
blockers.resolution_path: Retire high-severity blockers and rerun the governed review board.

entry_criteria: Research intake is linked to typed architecture controls.
exit_criteria: State variables and corridor policies are fixed for threshold planning.

entry_criteria: Core physics variables are linked to explicit metrics.
exit_criteria: Threshold ledgers cover density, comms, trust, and queue failure regimes.

entry_criteria: Scenario coverage spans weather and compound comms/trust stress.
exit_criteria: Hazards and thresholds are linked across scenario coverage.
notes: Promotion is limited to governed simulation loops.

entry_criteria: Hazard ledger is populated with mitigations and linked thresholds.
exit_criteria: Governance review confirms blocker retirement path.
notes: No pilot planning proceeds without governance review.

entry_criteria: Integrated simulation and safety review have bounded all known blockers.
exit_criteria: Governance board formally retires active blockers.
notes: This is planning only, not operational autonomy.

decision_context: Keep readiness claims inside governed simulation scope.
Prefer conservative holds when blocker severity is high.
